name: Consistency
essence: Show up on the scheduled day, especially the unremarkable ones.
behaviour: The habit happens on its calendar day, inspired or not.

name: Ownership
essence: If it lands on you, it is yours to move.
behaviour: Sends the follow up unprompted; no one has to chase.

name: Patience
essence: Let compounding do the heavy lifting.
behaviour: Holds the position through the boring middle without checking hourly.

name: Focus
behaviour: Phone sits in another room during the deep work block.

name: Presence
behaviour: Puts the phone face down and asks the second question.

name: Courage under visibility
essence: Do the uncomfortable right thing while being watched.
behaviour: Raises the dissenting point in the meeting, not after it.

name: Temperance
essence: Enough is a decision, not an amount.
behaviour: Stops at the planned limit — plate, spend, screen — without renegotiating.

name: Honesty with self
essence: Name the real reason, not the flattering one.
behaviour: Writes the actual cause in the journal, even when it stings.

name: Long-game relationships
essence: Invest in people with no invoice attached.
behaviour: Sends the check-in message when there is nothing to ask for.

name: Health as the base asset
essence: The body funds every other ambition.
behaviour: Trains today, sleeps tonight, books the checkup before it is urgent.
